generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR delivering 3D point cloud acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i depth camera providing RGB‑D data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor integrated into the electronic speed controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing servo position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C2: Acting components
instance MotorControllerActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle motor actuation via voltage commands sent to the embedded motor controller"
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation controlling the steering mechanism"
]

instance EmergencyBrakingActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Emergency braking actuation via command to accelerator and brake controls, performed by embedded control hardware"
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter-based object tracking for dynamic tracking of detected objects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control model implementing ISO 15622 performance class I algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D point cloud obtained from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, serialized for virtual processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance DepthImage : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image captured by Intel D435i camera, serialized for virtual processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SpeedMeasurement : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed measurement, serialized for virtual processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedMeasurementDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngle : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data, serialized for virtual processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrack : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks derived from point cloud clustering and Kalman tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance VehicleState : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time vehicle state after ACC model processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryPreview : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path preview from ACC control model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Human‑readable time‑series reports generated by the report generation service"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data translation functional entity handling serialization and unit conversion"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for point cloud clustering service using DBSCAN"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringService
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for object tracking service using Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC control service implementing ISO 15622 class I"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for report generation service producing human‑readable reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for 3D visualization service of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote management service allowing operator control of ACC parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data translation service handling serialization and unit conversion for sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationInsight
]

instance PointCloudClusteringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing DBSCAN point cloud clustering for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:provides PointCloudClusteringInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing Kalman filter tracking of detected objects"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing ACC control logic with ISO 15622 class I"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCStateInsight
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Report generation service producing time‑series reports in human‑readable format"
    DTDFVocab:provides ReportInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization service of vehicle and surrounding environment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance RemoteControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management service allowing operators to adjust ACC parameters and trigger emergency braking or disable ACC"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustACCParametersAction
    DTDFVocab:provides InitiateEmergencyBrakingAction
    DTDFVocab:provides DisableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance DataTranslationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of data serialization and unit conversion status"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of detected point cloud clusters"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of tracked moving objects in the environment"
]

instance ACCStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of current ACC system state, including desired speed and trajectory"
]

instance ReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of registrable reports of vehicle state over time"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight of 3D visual rendering of vehicle and track preview"
]

// C17: Actions
instance AdjustACCParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust ACC parameters such as desired speed and follower distance via UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance InitiateEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to initiate emergency braking from operator control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to disable ACC subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable ACC subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C18: Environment
instance ACCDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
    MotorControllerActuation, SteeringServoActuation, EmergencyBrakingActuation,
    DataTranslationEnabler, PointCloudClusteringEnabler, ObjectTrackingEnabler, ACCControlEnabler,
    ReportingEnabler, VisualizationEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler,
    DataTranslationService, PointCloudClusteringService, ObjectTrackingService, ACCControlService,
    ReportingService, VisualizationService, RemoteControlService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Desired speed and control command messages sent from the DT’s ACC controller to the vehicle’s actuator nodes; enable/disable ACC, desired speed modification, and emergency braking instructions transmitted via ROS 2 topics over Wi‑Fi to the Physical Twin Entity which actuates motor voltage and steering servo accordingly."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "All interactions operate in real‑time at an end‑to‑end network latency requirement of ≤100 ms; the DT processes sensor streams (LiDAR, speed, steering) and produces control commands within this bound; clock synchronization across distributed components is maintained to within ±100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration defined by the ISO 23247 reference architecture: entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User, Cross‑system) each containing functional entities; deployment across distributed hardware (vehicle compute cluster, cloud server, operator workstation) connected via Wi‑Fi and ROS 2 topics; Data Translation FE provides interoperability between entities; User Entity exposes 3‑D visualization and control panel interfaces; Digital Twin Entity hosts perception, control, reporting and storage functional entities; Physical Twin Entity hosts resource‑specific functions such as clustering and actuation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin is developed (design, implementation, testing) and deployed for the operated stage of the vehicle, where it provides runtime services such as monitoring, control, and diagnostics. No explicit design‑or‑manufacturing‑stage modelling is described."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by real‑time sensor data acquisition, DBSCAN clustering, Kalman tracking, and ISO 15622‑compliant ACC logic. Validation relies on real‑time monitoring dashboards and low‑latency communication (≤100 ms). Clock synchronisation (≤100 ms) guarantees event ordering. No formal verification or uncertainty quantification procedures are described."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Wi‑Fi connection between physical twin and Digital Twin; ROS2 (DDS) over UDP/TCP; Data Translation FE serializes data; network latency measured and constrained to ≤100 ms."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hybrid deployment: onboard Jetson for sensing/control, remote cloud server running ROS2 nodes for ACC offloading and data storage; Docker/VMs may be used; server may be public or private."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture adopted for entity definitions; ISO 15622 used for ACC control specifications; ROS 2 middleware follows DDS standards; OPC UA considered but not implemented; NVIDIA JetPack provides standardized SDK; GitHub repository uses standard open‑source licensing."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical nature noted; latency and clock sync requirements (≤100 ms) per 3GPP; no detailed cybersecurity measures described; remote command execution requires safe operation but details not provided."
]
